series_metadata.series_description: The application for individual license renewal shows the basis for issuance of certified public accountant and public accountant licenses, including address and phone number, military history, education information, current and previous employer information, continuing education reporting, public accounting firm affiliation and/or registration, attestations and signatures. Series also may include fee and payment information.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: a machine readable version has been created and verified accuracy, or audit by Auditor of State audit report is released, ; Electronic: two months death of certificate holder
